steps.title: Apply the vertical shift
steps.content:
Translating a graph $6$ units down subtracts $6$ from every output value. Starting from $y=7x$, the new equation is:
$$y=7x-6$$

steps.title: Check the direction
steps.content: Adding $6$ would shift the graph up. Changing $x$ inside parentheses would shift the graph horizontally. The down shift is represented by subtracting $6$ outside the $7x$ term. The answer is B.
